rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same core scope problem — the premature Layer-5/6 ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup stubs and IsUnipotent — and would lead to stripping the PR to the same Layer-0 foundations (AffineAlgGroup + AlgPoints). The only difference is Review 1's demand to unbundle AffineAlgGroup's smoothness, but this is a design-philosophy point that cannot be confirmed against the diff alone (the roadmap is not in the diff). Both resulting PRs would be materially equivalent.
